form.formComment: Last start came from midfield and won by 1.75 len at Osmangazi All Weather March 30 over 1300m defeating Daella with 59kg at $4.45. Before that in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 19 over 1400m, 8 len behind Hard Runner with 59kg at $10.85. Racing well and can win again.

formComments.title: TAB

Before that in a small field at Sirinyer All Weather on March 19 over 1400m, 8 len behind Hard Runner with 59kg at $10.85. Racing well and can win again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run in a small field at this track on March 21 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Statue Of Liberty carrying 58kg at $12.05. Before that 3rd in a small field at this track on March 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Jazz Runner carrying 55kg at $5.85. Can make amends for a modest effort last time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when came from midfield and won by 2.5 len at Veliefendi August 1 over 1200m defeating Kayros carrying 57kg at $15.15. Marginal prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(26). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when came from midfield and won by 2.5 len at Veliefendi August 1 over 1200m defeating Kayros carrying 57kg at $15.15. Marginal prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 2nd in a small field at this track on March 11 over 2000m, 2 len behind Falconnidae with 54kg at $1.20. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on June 11 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind El Gladiador with 57kg at $2.70. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Second run back. First-up after four months 2nd in a small field at this track on March 11 over 2000m, 2 len behind Falconnidae with 54kg at $1.20. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on June 11 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind El Gladiador with 57kg at $2.70. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last campaign ran last in a small field at this track on January 21 over 1200m, 8 len behind Daella carrying 55.5kg at $1.70. Won previous preparation first up favourite; scored a big 5 len win at Veliefendi July 13 over 1200m defeating Linares with 57kg at $2.20. Likely to make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 9 at this track on March 18 over 1500m, 3 len behind Wolf Rules with 55kg at $6.10. Before that 4th in a small field at this track on March 4 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Jazz Runner carrying 54kg at $2.95. Looks safely held on recent runs.
